candidate.objective: Experienced Poly Welder with a solid background in HDPE pipeline installation across both FIFO and local Western Australian projects. Alex has held welding positions with KCU and Polyfit Fabrication, developing comprehensive skills in butt fusion, electrofusion, extrusion, and socket welding across a wide range of pipe sizes from 160mm to 630mm. Holds a Trade Certificate in Wall and Ceiling Lining and is experienced with Dixon, McElroy, and Ritmo welding machines. Available immediately for placement.

duties: Operated a range of poly welding machines including Dixon and McElroy to weld pipe from 160mm to 630mm diameter.
Performed liner installation across project sites.
Installed air valves, valves, and bores as required.
Read and interpreted construction plans and drawings to execute welding activities.
Conducted extrusion welding and socket welding operations.
Operated Dixon, McElroy, and Ritmo welding machines for poly pipeline fabrication both on-site and in the workshop.
Performed FIFO poly pipeline welding across remote project sites.
Completed electrofusion pipeline welding to project and quality specifications.
Carried out extrusion weld and socket weld pipe work.
Installed pond linings, dewatering pits, pipeline installations, valve installations, pump installations, and suction and discharge set-ups.
Constructed turkey nest set-ups and managed plant pipeline connections and disconnections.
Quoted jobs and read job plan sheets to determine scope and materials.
Installed framework, various sheet types, and a range of cornice profiles.
Completed flush jointing and sanding in preparation for painting.
Installed large ornamental cornices, ceiling roses, and arch doorframes.
Managed client and builder relationships throughout project delivery.

skills.detail: Proficient in butt fusion, electrofusion, extrusion, and socket welding of HDPE pipelines across sizes from 160mm to 630mm, using Dixon, McElroy, and Ritmo machines.
Experienced in liner installation, valve and bore installation, dewatering systems, pond linings, pump installation, and suction and discharge set-up.
Competent in reading and interpreting construction plans, isometric drawings, and technical documents to guide welding and installation activities.
Holds a Chainsaw ticket, Telehandler ticket, Dogging ticket, and a Trade Certificate in Wall and Ceiling Lining, in addition to poly welding qualifications.

certifications.details: Accredited butt fusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Accredited electrofusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Certified to operate telehandler / telescopic handler machinery.

certifications.ticket: Trade Certificate — Wall and Ceiling Lining
certifications.details: Trade qualification in wall and ceiling lining installation.
Western Australia C Class drivers licence.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
